description.ko: 빛과 물질이 사라지기 시작하는 깊은 우주의 고요하고 무한한 어둠을 항해하는 VOID-3 탐사선의 시각적 묘사입니다.
description.en: A visual representation of the VOID-3 exploration vessel navigating the silent, infinite darkness of the deep cosmos where light and matter begin to fade.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the VOID-3 spacecraft drifting through a vast, dark cosmic abyss, faint bioluminescent nebulae in deep indigo and obsidian, sparkling stardust particles, cold metallic textures reflecting distant dying stars, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, silent atmosphere
